title: ourisia breviflora subsp. uniflora
intro: Ourisia breviflora subsp. uniflora, also known as New Zealand broom, is a type of flowering plant in the genus Ourisia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Ourisia breviflora subsp. uniflora include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
